description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stable-slim Docker image and caches the .gitlab-ci-stack/ directory. Define a single job named stack_test (running in the default stage) that first updates the apt package index with apt-get --quiet update and installs curl via apt-get --quiet --assume-yes install curl. Then download and install Haskell Stack by piping https://get.haskellstack.org/ to sh, and run stack --stack-root $PWD/.gitlab-ci-stack test --only-dependencies --no-run-tests --install-ghc to fetch dependencies and install GHC. Finally execute stack --stack-root $PWD/.gitlab-ci-stack test to run the test suite.
